content:
銀樞幻衣商店「簡約幻衣（二期）」：「阿格里帕·蒼白契約」與「尤烏哈希·淬血榮冠」永久上架！
兩套幻衣均可使用「簡約幻衣繪形券（二期）」限時免費獲取！

⭐**活動時間： **6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 14 日 9:00
⭐**獲取方式：**活動期間守密人最多可獲得2張「簡約幻衣繪形券（二期）」
✦ 在「學園禮贈」累計 7 日登入，可獲1張
✦ 參與玩法活動「偉大的征服」並完成全部癲狂難度通關，可獲1張

活動結束後兩套幻衣將恢復680源液的原價，守密人記得及時兌換~

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Garment Ordering Update: Basic Skins—2nd Edition: 
"Agrippa: Pallid Covenant" and "Uvhash: Bloodforged Diadem" are now permanently available!
During the event, both skins can be exchanged for free with "Basic Skin Voucher: 2nd Edition"!

⭐**Event Period: **9:00 AM, June 30 - 9:00 AM, July 14
⭐**Acquisition Method: **Keepers can obtain up to 2 "Basic Skin Voucher: 2nd Edition" during the event time:
✦ Log in for a total of 7 days in "Gifts from Mythag" to receive 1 Voucher!
✦ Participate in "The Great Conquering" and complete all Madness difficulty stages to receive 1 Voucher!

After the event, the two Basic Skins will be available for purchase at 680 Silver Prime. Keepers, don't forget to grab them while they're free~
thread_title: V2.2.3預告：特別幻衣活動┊V2.2.3 Preview: Awakener Skins Event

content:
⭐**版本活動時間：**6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 14 日 9:00

⭐**「偉大的征服」介紹：**
✦ 「偉大的征服」共包含 5 個挑戰關卡，活動首日開放 1 個，之後每 2 天開放 1 個。
✦ 守密人可用活動中獲取的「美味雷歐烤肉」在「敬獻貢禮」活動商店兌換流明之芯、無垢之芯、賢石碎屑等豐富獎勵。

⭐**異夢視界「征廚房記」介紹：**
✦ 版本期間將限時免費開放。活動共設有2個劇情關卡，全部通關後，即可解鎖全新鑰令「獵食決心」。
✦ 「獵食決心」鑰令效果：從出戰喚醒體的「技能卡」中發現 3 張，選擇 1 張將其臨時複製置入手中並使其算力消耗降低 1。若當前界域為血肉，可以選擇「一掃而光！」：將全部卡牌的臨時複製置入手中，但不再降低算力消耗。

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

⭐**Event Duration: **June 30, 9:00 AM - July 14, 9:00 AM

⭐**New Event "The Great Conquering":**
✦ "The Great Conquering" includes a total of 5 challenge stages. One stage will be available on the first day of the event, and an additional stage will open every two days thereafter.
✦ Exchange "Leonian Barbecue" obtained in the event for various rewards: Luminous Core, Pure Core, Aetheric Shard, and more at the "Offer Tribute" event store.

⭐**New Dreamscape "Culinary Dominion":**
✦ Free unlock during Version 2.2.3. The event includes 2 story stages, and upon completing all of them, you will unlock the new Posse "Voracious Resolve".
✦ New Possee "Voracious Resolve": Discover 3 cards from the "Skill Cards" of all the Awakeners in your team. Choose 1 to add a Temporary Copy with -1 Arithmetica Cost into your hand. If the current Realm is Caro, you may activate "Gobble Up!": Put Temporary Copies of all 3 cards into your hand, but no longer reduce their Arithmetica Costs.
thread_title: V2.2.3預告: 版本活動「偉大的征服」┊V2.2.3 Preview: Version Event—The Great Conquering
